subject: Daein
fact: Daein could not resist adding a vain flourish to his auditory illusion performance.
source_quote: Daein couldn't resist adding a vain flourish

subject: Daein
fact: Daein winked at Bramgrim while striking the giant.
source_quote: Daein killed an ogre and struck the giant twice with an axe while winking at Bramgrim

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim felt shamed by Daein's relentless offensive and abandoned his healing-only stance.
source_quote: Bramgrim, shamed by Daein's relentless offensive, relented his healing-only stance

subject: Bramgrim

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak felt frustration that he had not conceived of the Blink event himself.
source_quote: Solom's notes revealed his frustration at not having conceived of the Blink himself

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak wished the Blink event had been his idea.
source_quote: Solom blamed powerful wizards and liches from Menzoberranzan for the Blink, wishing it had been his idea

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak realized that demons were interested only in chaos and destruction.
source_quote: He had initially attempted to negotiate with the demons but quickly realized they were interested only in chaos and destruction

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap complained about the lack of salt in the party's provisions.

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap had no desire to return to the Nine Hells.
source_quote: where he had no desire to go

subject: The Party
fact: The party debated whether intervening with the ogres would draw unwanted attention.
source_quote: Though the party debated whether intervening would draw unwanted attention

subject: The Party
fact: The party decided that the potential intelligence from the imp was worth the risk of intervening.
source_quote: they ultimately decided the potential intelligence was worth the risk

subject: The Party
fact: The party rejected Pipyap's initial contract that would have bound them to serve him.
source_quote: rejecting Pipyap's initial contract that would have bound them to serve him

source_quote: Bramgrim recalled that Hillsfar had been controlled by Graz'zt

subject: The Party
fact: The party knew they had only until nightfall to accomplish their objectives before the dinner began.
source_quote: knowing they had only until nightfall to accomplish everything before the dinner began

subject: The Party
fact: The party was reminded of their goals to get a demonically infused giant and secure a book from Vraxen.
source_quote: The party was reminded their goals were to get a demonically infused giant and secure a book from Vraxen

fact: Pipyap claims to know everything about the city of Maerimydra.

fact: Pipyap enjoys being on the prime material plane and has no desire to return to the Nine Hells.

fact: Pipyap complained about the lack of salt in the party's food.

fact: The party decided to prioritize getting the fiendish giant first, then provoking the war, then stealing the book.
